description: This is a Flutter application's main Dart source file that defines the app's entry point, UI structure, and backend connectivity check logic.

classes.name: MyApp
classes.description: A StatelessWidget that sets up the MaterialApp theme and home page.

classes.name: StatusPage
classes.description: A StatefulWidget that displays the backend status check UI.

classes.name: _StatusPageState
classes.description: State class managing the backend status checking logic and UI updates.

methods.name: main
methods.description: The application's entry point that initializes and runs the Flutter app.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the UI for both MyApp and StatusPage widgets (overridden in respective classes).

methods.name: _checkBackend
methods.description: Performs an HTTP GET request to check backend server status, updates UI state accordingly.

methods.name: initState
methods.description: Initializes the state in _StatusPageState and triggers the backend check.
